description: Native multi-file open picker for `cs upload`. Granted to LOCALLY-served SPA windows (workspace-*, terminal-*, control-terminal-* connect-script terminals, local::<window_id> watcher-opened workspace windows) and to the user's own devserver windows reached at loopback (lib-*, e.g. over an ssh -L / chan tunnel -- the loopback remote.urls below scope this file to that case; the gateway tunnel origin's equivalent grant lives in devserver-window.json). Excludes outbound-* (ad-hoc remote-URL attach): this command pops a native open panel and reads the chosen files' bytes off the local disk, so it stays off untrusted remote-served webviews. The picker is user-interactive (the user picks the files) and `cs upload` is a user-initiated terminal command, so a static grant to the user's own windows is acceptable; a per-gesture handshake ACL is the follow-up.
